movie.actors: Tim Matheson, Jennifer Jason Leigh, William Atherton, Hoyt Axton
movie.plot: Clint is an every day working man whose wife Joanna is having an affair with a doctor. They plot to kill him and get the insurance money. Only trouble the drug overdose they give him doesn't kill him. Lucky for Clint he's buried in a cheap wooden box and he unburies himself. Just remember, Hell hath no fury like a man buried alive!
movie.title: Buried Alive
movie.writer: David A. Davies (story), Mark Patrick Carducci (teleplay)
